channel.title: Agents on Yiming Xu
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on Yiming Xu

item.title: Hierarchical Planner
item.description: A navigation-first planner that walks a document’s hierarchy instead of flat top-k retrieval, using layered embeddings as routing hints.

item.title: Context engineering
item.description: Notes on shaping the context window as a first-class design surface.
